inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net income $771M ÷ ~428M Class A shares (10-K FY2025); normalized owner cash proxy for royalty collections net of operating burden
inputs.normalization_note: Not using $0.88 dividend alone (reinvestment-heavy). OCF $2.49B includes NCI and new royalty deployment; base uses earnings power per Class A share.

bear.notes: Key patent cliffs, leverage overhang, flat royalty collections, multiple compression

base.notes: Portfolio revenue mid-single-digit growth; dividend growth; stable royalty multiple

bull.notes: New royalty closes (e.g. Biohaven), pipeline launches, equity marks up, deleveraging

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Royalty receivables and equity stakes on balance sheet; economic value tied to drug sales, not book alone (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped pipeline / new royalty options?
option_scan.evidence: Q1 2026 Biohaven transaction; ongoing royalty acquisitions (10-Q Q1 2026, 8-K)

option_scan.question: Backlog not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: 35+ commercial products; revenue $2.38B FY2025 grows with partner sales

option_scan.question: Transitory legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No material one-off recovery in base year

paths.label: Lawrence ten-year cash flow (base)
paths.weight_why: Primary stance gate; no approved third-party paths.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
